scale.label: text-xs font-sans font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500

layout_strategy.logo_handling: CRITICAL: The logo has a dark background. It MUST be placed inside a dark container (#0B0B0D or #101B36) to blend its edges invisible. Do not place it directly on white.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4B36A] hover:bg-[#B59550] text-[#0B0B0D] font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(212,179,106,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(212,179,106,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-none transition-all
buttons.google: w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium h-12 rounded-none flex items-center justify-center gap-3 transition-all relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.style: h-12 bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#101B36] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#101B36] rounded-none transition-all font-sans placeholder:text-slate-400

structure: Left: Immersive Image (Palace Interior) with Dark Overlay + Gold Quote
Right: Cream Background + Centered Auth Card
Card Header: Dark Navy (#0B0B0D) + Logo + 'Welcome' text
Card Body: White (#FFFFFF) + Google Button + Divider + Email Input + OTP
Right: Cream Background + Centered Auth Card
Card Header: Dark Navy (#0B0B0D) + Logo + 'Team Portal'

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. CRITICAL LOGO FIX: You MUST place the logo inside a container with background color #0B0B0D (Midnight) or #101B36 (Navy). The logo has a baked-in dark background. If you place it on white, it will look like a mistake. The Header of the Auth Card MUST be dark.
2. SPLIT LAYOUT: Use a 50/50 split on desktop. Left side is image (`h-screen sticky top-0`), right side is scrollable content.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'font-serif' (Cormorant) for all Greetings (Welcome Back, Sign In) and 'font-sans' (DM Sans) for all inputs and labels.
4. GOOGLE BUTTON: Make it premium. No standard blue. Use White bg + Border + Color Logo. Hover effect should be subtle.
5. OTP INPUT: Use the Shadcn 'InputOTP' component if available, or styling a standard input to look like widely spaced chars.

6. 3D EFFECT: Add a subtle 'tilt' effect to the Auth Card using Framer Motion (if available) or CSS hover perspective. The user requested '3D rotating or something different' - a subtle 3D tilt on the card is elegant.
7. IMAGE: Use the provided Unsplash URL for the left panel. Add a black/navy overlay with 40% opacity to ensure text readability if you place text over it.
8. DO NOT ASK questions. Build the best version of this.
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters where appropriate (e.g. over the image).
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
